about.heading: About
about.buyMeCoffeeAlt: Buy Me a Coffee at ko-fi.com

usage.heading: Usage
usage.privacyNote: Statistics are stored locally and never sent anywhere.

clearDialog.title: Clear usage data
clearDialog.message: This will clear all usage data. This action cannot be undone.

presets.heading: Presets
presets.description: Save and restore to quickly switch configurations.

behavior.heading: Behavior
behavior.description: Change how the auto clicker runs.
behavior.stopReasonDesc: Show a notification when the auto clicker stops.
behavior.strictHotkeyDesc: Require exact modifier keys for hotkeys.
behavior.gameCompatibleModeDesc: Inject clicks without the synthetic-event marker. Enable for games (e.g. SDL/TapTap) that filter auto-clicker input. Hotkey self-suppression is preserved.
behavior.enableExecutionLogDesc: Show each click's target (coordinate, process, window class) in the log tab. Throttled to 10 updates/sec.
behavior.restartAsAdminDesc: Required to click games running as administrator (e.g. TapTap). The app exits and relaunches with a UAC prompt.
behavior.stopOnAltTabDesc: Stop clicking when switching to another window.
behavior.extendedSpeedDesc: Allow click speeds up to 1000 CPS (may affect performance).

extendedSpeedDialog.title: Enable extended click speed limit?
extendedSpeedDialog.message: This will allow click speeds beyond the default limit. This may affect performance.

startup.heading: Startup
startup.minimizeToTrayDesc: Minimize to the system tray instead of the taskbar.
startup.runOnStartupDesc: Start clicking when the app opens.

appearance.heading: Appearance
appearance.themeDesc: Choose between dark and light mode.
appearance.backgroundImageDesc: Path or URL to a background image.

reset.heading: Reset
reset.description: Reset all settings or usage data.
reset.resetAllDesc: Reset all settings to their defaults.

dialog.title: Reset all settings
dialog.message: This will reset all settings to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

update.installed: Update installed. Restart to apply it.
update.restartFailed: Restart failed. Please reopen the app manually.
update.alreadyPreparing: The update is already being prepared...
